sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 1
items.html: What are the two Zivugim [couplings] in a Partzuf? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 2
items.html: What are the two Zivugim over the MAN [Mayin Nukvin]? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 3
items.html: What are the two parts of Lights in the AHP of the upper one while it is for MAN in its upper-upper one? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 4
items.html: What is the difference between: the first Zivug over the MAN, Bi'ah Kadma'ah [the first coming], Rucha Kadma'ah [the first spirit], the first Kli, first MAN which are never lacking; and Nesirah, and the double portion? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 5
items.html: Why is the Rucha Kadma'ah the root of all the clarifications in the world? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 6
items.html: Why does a woman not conceive from the first coming? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 7
items.html: Which illumination is necessary for the lower one before the raising of MAN? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 8
items.html: When does ZA give her a Kli that raises MAN, and when does he give her the Rucha Kadma'ah? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 9
items.html: In which state is the Rucha Kadma'ah bestowed — in Achor be Achor [back-to-back], or Panim be Panim [face-to-face] of ZON? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 10
items.html: Why are the MAN of the first Zivug without form? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 11
items.html: How does that Ruach which he casts into her comprise all the sons she bears, until, when the Ruach departs, her way ceases as with women and she stops bearing? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 12
items.html: Why are a first coming, a Kli and Ruach, a second coming, suckling, Nesirah, and so on, needed for each and every Zivug of Neshama, Haya, Yechida? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 13
items.html: Why does the Rucha Kadma'ah of ZA not suffice for the Gadlut of the Nukva? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 14
items.html: How many degrees must join in every raising of MAN? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 15
items.html: What is the meaning of the MAN ascending only twice? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 16
items.html: How are the two orders in the MAN, from above downward and from below upward: that in the first, the upper one takes first and leaves the inferior part to the lower one; and in the second, the lower one takes first and leaves the superior part to the upper one? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 17
items.html: Why is the matter of raising MAN perpetual? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 18
items.html: Through whom is the beginning of the raising of MAN from within the Klipot [shells] done? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 19
items.html: Through whom is the beginning of the raising of MAN of the discernment of the Lights, namely the Reshimot [records], done? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 20
items.html: When does the Partzuf ascend of itself, and when does it need the upper one to raise it? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 21
items.html: How can the lower one ascend for MAN to the upper one while it has Mochin of Yenika [suckling]? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 22
items.html: Why are the MAN always alluded to by the name BON [son]? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 23
items.html: What are the MAN of the discernment of the embryo, and what is the discernment of the MAN in the Nukva herself? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 24
items.html: Why is the forming of the embryo attributed to the twenty-two letters, and not to MANTZEPACH? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 25
items.html: From which root are the upper one and the lower one called brothers to one another, and from which root are they father and son? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 26
items.html: Why do the three first Partzufim unfold and emanate one from the other, single from single, while ZON needs three Partzufim, AA and AVI, to partake in its emanation? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 27
items.html: Why do AVI have their main hold in the hairs of the head and the Dikna [beard] of AA, while ZON have no main existence in Atzilut? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 28
items.html: Why can the Nukva receive nothing except from ZA? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 29
items.html: Why is the lower third of Yesod the point of Malchut? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 30
items.html: Why are AHP considered NHY? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 31
items.html: Whence is the existence of the Nukva of Atzilut? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 32
items.html: What is the correction intended by the ascent of NHY to HGT in the Ibur [conception]? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 33
items.html: Which correction reaches the Nukva with the Ibur of ZA? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 34
items.html: Which correction reaches the Nukva with the Yenika [suckling] of ZA? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 35
items.html: What is the correction the Nukva receives from the measure of Yesod? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 36
items.html: What is the correction the Nukva receives from the measure of Tifferet? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 37
items.html: Why do the Yesod and Malchut of the Nukva have nothing to lean upon in ZA? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 38
items.html: How is the Yesod of the Nukva corrected by force of the striking of the Gevurot of the back of the Chazeh [chest] of ZA? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 39
items.html: How can the Nukva receive the Netzach and Hod of ZA after they have become HG [Hesed and Gevurah]? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 40
items.html: How did the HGT of ZA seal the Yesod of the Nukva? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 41
items.html: How, at the time of the Gadlut of ZA, do the HGT that became HBD ascend, and the NHY that became HGT, and new NHY come to him? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 42
items.html: What is the difference between male Gevurot and female Gevurot? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 43
items.html: Why are the five Hassadim and the five Gevurot called Atarin [crowns]? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 44
items.html: Whence comes the opening of the doors for birth? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 45
items.html: What caused her pangs to turn upon her? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 46
items.html: What is the forming power in the womb? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 47
items.html: What is the power that detains and closes in the newborn in the womb? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 48
items.html: What causes the birth of the Partzuf? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 49
items.html: When does the embryo attain NRNHY of Kelim [vessels]? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 50
items.html: In which times does it attain NRNHY of Nitzotzin [sparks]? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 51
items.html: In which times does the embryo attain NRNHY of Lights? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 52
items.html: When is the Nukva fit to bear? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 53
items.html: Why does the Nukva begin from the Chazeh of ZA and below? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 54
items.html: Why is the Butzina de Kardinuta standing in the Chazeh of ZA a part of the Light of Malchut? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 55
items.html: What is the meaning of the Butzina de Kardinuta making an opening in the back of ZA in order to bestow upon the Nukva? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 56
items.html: Why is the place of the Zivug called by the name opening [Nekev], or mouth [Peh]? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 57
items.html: Why is the discernment of the Malchut of the Nukva not a complete discernment? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 58
items.html: Why was a Zivug of Neshikin [kisses] needed for the first Ibur of ZA? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 59
items.html: Since there was a Zivug of Neshikin also in the Ibur of ZA, why did he not receive the Gadlut of GAR at once? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 60
items.html: What is the meaning of the Nukva taking Mochin not by way of ZA? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 61
items.html: What caused the Nukva to clothe the whole stature of ZA from behind him? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 62
items.html: Since she clothed the whole stature of ZA, why did she clothe him only from behind, and not at his face? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 63
items.html: What is the reason that the Nukva, in the time of her Katnut, is adhered to ZA in one wall, Achor be Achor [back-to-back]? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 64
items.html: What is the meaning that at the time of the Nesirah [sawing apart], the Mochin of ZA must depart? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 65
items.html: What is the meaning that the Binot and Gevurot in the Mochin of ZA depart from him and clothe in the Nukva? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 66
items.html: Why is there no distinct recognition of a Nukva above AVI? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 67
items.html: What are the Lights, Nitzotzin, and Kelim included in the MAN? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 68
items.html: How are the Nitzotzin and Kelim in BYA corrected? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 69
items.html: What is the meaning of the public domain and the private domain? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 70
items.html: Why are there no Klipot, God forbid, in Atzilut? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 71
items.html: What are the four simple letters of HaVaYaH? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 72
items.html: What are the ten letters of the filling of HaVaYaH? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 73
items.html: What are the twenty-eight letters of the filling of the filling of the ten letters? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 74
items.html: What is HaVaYaH in Ribua [squared]? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 75
items.html: What is the discernment of the number and the Gematria of HaVaYaH? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 76
items.html: What is the male name MB [42] in the drop of Mayin Duchrin [male waters]? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 77
items.html: What is the difference between the name MB of the letters of HaVaYaH, and the name MB of the letters of EKYEH? (to the answer)

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Questions on Topics 78
items.html: What is the Hotam [seal] within a Hotam? (to the answer)
